---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# momentum estimate

* get shadows of subsystem

```{julia}
# calibration 
using NPZ
calibration_data = npzread("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz")
calibration_vec = calibration_data["calibration"]
```

```{julia}
# product shadows of subsystem.
using RandomMeas
N = 4
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", N);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
subrange = [1, 2, 3, 4];
subgroup = reduce_to_subsystem(measurement_group, subrange);
subshadows = get_dense_shadows(subgroup, G=calibration_vec[subrange]);
```

## get estimate of op

### reflect op

```{julia}
# permute the order of op and calculate op 
include("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/ops_estimate/aux_fun.jl")
include("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/ops_estimate/create_ops.jl")
permuted_order = [1, 4, 2, 3]
permuted_siteindices = permute_siteindices(siteindices, permuted_order)
adjacent_swap_op = create_adjacent_swap_op(permuted_siteindices);
@show estimate_val = get_expect_shadow(adjacent_swap_op, subshadows);
```
